result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 2:        AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) A...
                                                  ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS case_count,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS case_count,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

      FROM casehistory__c

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS case_count,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CAST(closeddate AS timestamp) - CAST(createddate AS timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE CAST(createddate AS date) >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND CAST(createddate AS date) < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS case_count,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CAST(closeddate AS timestamp) - CAST(createddate AS timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds

  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'

      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CAST(closeddate AS timestamp) - CAST(createddate AS timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds

WHERE CAST(createddate AS date) >= DATE '2023-05-02'

result.preview: "No agent meets all the specified conditions in the available data (there are no agents who, in the past four months, processed more than one qualifying case with a computable handle time under the given transfer rules)."
